bp_method: SRA: Illumina NextSeq 429.67 Gb (55 runs) + ONT MinION 12.71 Gb (56 runs). SRA metadata does not distinguish untargeted vs hybrid capture Illumina (all labeled library_selection=RANDOM). Excludes amplicon data. 10 sites x 6 weeks.

title: Unveiling the global urban virome through wastewater metagenomics
bp_method: estimated: 638 runs from 314 samples. SRA metadata doesn't distinguish methods, but paper reports metagenomic has more reads than capture. Separated by assigning higher bp run per sample to metagenomic (311 samples, 28.68 Gb) and lower bp to GastroCap capture (311 samples, 15.27 Gb). Remaining 1.24 Gb from samples with ≠2 runs.
